creatorUid.description: The UID of the user who created the paper.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the paper was created.

Section.title: Section
Section.description: Represents a section within an exam paper.

order.description: The display order of the section.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question within an exam paper.

category.description: The category of the question (e.g., MCQ, Short Answer).

imageUrl.description: Optional URL for a diagram or image.

sectionId.description: The ID of the section this question belongs to.

order.description: The display order of the question.

/papers/{paperId}/sections.description: Subcollection of sections for a specific paper.

/papers/{paperId}/questions.description: Subcollection of questions for a specific paper.
